word: H7812 - שָׁחָה - shâchâh - shaw-khaw' - Bow down

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁחה

Transliteration: shâchâh

Phonetic: shaw-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bow down
    1. (Qal) to bow down
    2. (Hiphil) to depress (figuratively)
    3. (Hithpael)
      1. to bow down, prostrate oneself
        1. before superior in homage
        2. before God in worship
        3. before false gods
        4. before angel

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2360

Part(s) of speech: Verb
